docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-09-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,400.00 FILED BY URTZ, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVERA, WANDENKOLLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT OLIVERA, WANDENKOLLE
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF URTZ, BRADLEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-27-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF BRADLEY URTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WANDENKOLLE OLIVERA IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BRADLEY. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT WANDENKOLLE OLIVERA. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
